title: Lovers in Quarantine
writer: F. Tennyson Jesse, Townsend Martin, Luther Reed
actors: Bebe Daniels, Harrison Ford, Alfred Lunt
plot: Engaged to African explorer Anthony Blunt, Pamela Gordon grows tired of waiting and becomes engaged to MackIntosh Josephs. Blunt returns, and he and Pamela decide to elope to Bermuda. To deceive MackIntosh, Pamela has Blunt preten...
